name: Jumbo Shrimp & Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the asparagus pieces to a pot of water. Bring to a boil and cook for 3 minutes.
2. Drain the asparagus and set aside, reserving 2 tablespoons of the cooking liquid.
3. Heat the cooking oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the shrimp pieces to the skillet and cook until their color changes, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the reserved asparagus, ginger, soy sauce, sugar, sherry, and salt to the skillet.
6. Stir in the reserved asparagus water and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
